codebase_patterns.framework: Python 3.11+ CLI with click, pydantic, colorama, pytest

file_structure.licenseguard/: Main package (cli.py, scanner.py, policy.py, models.py, reporter.py)
file_structure.sample-project/: Test fixture with node_modules for manual testing

patterns: Pydantic BaseModel for data modeling (Dependency, Policy)
Click command groups for CLI structure
pytest fixtures for temporary file structures
Deduplication by (name, version) tuple using Set[Tuple[str, str]]
common_mistakes_to_avoid: os.walk without followlinks=False creates symlink traversal vulnerabilities
Reading user-controlled files without size limits can cause memory exhaustion
npm packages can have license arrays for dual-licensing - handle them
Using 'except Exception' in library code hides bugs - be specific
Inconsistent error handling between modules confuses users

security_notes: Always use followlinks=False with os.walk on user directories
Check file size before reading user-controlled files
Specify UTF-8 encoding explicitly for file operations

sessions.review_findings: WARN - symlink traversal, no file size limit, missing license array handling
sessions.qa_result: PASS - 19/19 tests, all edge cases verified
